economics.source: MegaETH Blockscout token snapshots, Aave address book, and World Markets lending snapshot.

methodology.m0: M0 = total tokenized USDM supply minus USDM held in tracked lending vaults and reserves. DEX and spot balances stay inside M0.
methodology.m1: M1 = M0 plus USDM-denominated demand-deposit claims on tracked lending protocols, including Aave aMegUSDm and World Markets USDM lending deposits.

excluded.reason: DefiLlama MegaETH TVL is WETH/ETH only and no USDM-denominated demand deposits were detected.

project.name: World Markets
project.description: Canonical MegaETH PrimeDEX with unified cross margin for spot, perpetual futures, and loans.

sources.label: World Markets site
sources.note: Project site visual direction and product positioning.

sources.label: DefiLlama World Markets Spot
sources.note: Spot TVL, spot DEX volume, and spot fees.

sources.label: DefiLlama World Markets Perps
sources.note: Perps fees methodology and fee totals.

sources.label: DefiLlama TVL adapter
sources.note: Counts exchange contract token balances as TVL.

sources.label: DefiLlama dimension adapter
sources.note: NewTrade, InterestPaid, LendPositionChanged, LendPositionClosed, and Liquidation event methodology.

sources.label: MegaETH Blockscout exchange
sources.note: Live exchange balances and on-chain logs.

spotTvl.methodology: DefiLlama counts WETH, USDM, USDT0, BTC.B, and WITRY held by the WorldInc exchange contract. Blockscout live view also shows MEGA and dust balances.

spotVolume.source: DefiLlama DEXs summary, slug world-markets-spot, dataType dailyVolume.

volume.source: Daily 24h notional is refreshed from DefiLlama perps fees using the last observed on-chain fee-rate; hourly and market distributions keep the last full on-chain shape.

fees.source: DefiLlama fees summary, slug world-markets-perps, dataType dailyFees.
fees.methodology: Perps trading fees plus lending interest plus liquidation fees.

spotFees.source: DefiLlama fees summary, slug world-markets-spot, dataType dailyFees.

lending.source: On-chain MegaETH LendPositionChanged and LendPositionClosed logs, active positions checked with readLendingPosition on the exchange contract.

euphoria.source: MegaETH Blockscout counters + MegaETH RPC ERC-20 Transfer logs
euphoria.methodology: Daily volume and PnL snapshots use MegaETH USDM Transfer logs involving the Euphoria contract. Player volume and PnL exclude the Euphoria pool, while raw transfer counts keep every USDM transfer touching the contract. Daily users count unique transaction callers to the Euphoria contract. Since-live totals start from the official 2026-05-14 UTC launch window.

last24h.label: Unique transaction callers over the last 24h from MiniBlocks.

hitone.source: MegaETH Blockscout counters + MegaETH RPC ERC-20 Transfer logs
hitone.methodology: Daily snapshots use MegaETH USDM Transfer logs involving the HitOne address. Player volume and PnL treat USDM sent to HitOne as stakes and USDM sent from HitOne as payouts. Since-live transfer totals use the all-time Blockscout counter because HitOne predates MegaFees daily snapshots.

last24h.label: Unique USDM transfer counterparties over the last 24h from Blockscout.

fees.methodology: Project revenue assumes HitOne keeps 1% of each incoming trade amount immediately and 5% of realized profit. Because the HitOne address is an EOA with no on-chain trade id, payouts are matched against each wallet's running net principal balance first; any payout excess is treated as profit already net of the 5% fee, so project profit fee = net profit paid x 5 / 95.
